evals.prompt: evals/files/seed-fitness.txt を読んでiOSアプリのアイデアを生成して、企画書をMarkdownで出力して
evals.expected_output: 3–5 iOS app proposals in Markdown. Each proposal must include: overview, target audience table, MVP feature list, monetization plan with pricing table, AWS tech architecture, dev phases, and a scorecard. End with a ranked recommendation.
assertions: Output contains at least 3 distinct app proposals
Each proposal has a Target Audience section with a table
Each proposal includes a Monetization Strategy section with pricing
Each proposal includes an AWS architecture table with specific services
Each proposal includes a Development Phases table
Each proposal includes a Scorecard with star ratings
Output ends with a ranked recommendation summary
Proposals are grounded in the seed content (strength training / habit tracking domain)

evals.prompt: evals/files/seed-reading.txt のシードファイルを使ってアプリ企画書を作って。ファイルに保存してほしい
evals.expected_output: 3–5 app proposals saved to a Markdown file. Content covers reading/bookshelf domain from the seed. Each proposal uses the standard template including target audience, monetization, Expo+AWS tech stack, and dev phases.
assertions: Output is saved to a .md file (not just printed inline)
Output contains at least 3 distinct app proposals
Proposals are grounded in reading/books domain from the seed
Each proposal has monetization strategy with a pricing table
Tech architecture section references Expo and at least two AWS services
Output ends with a ranked recommendation

evals.prompt: evals/files/seed-freelance.txt を読んで、副業フリーランス向けのiOSアプリアイデアを考えて。企画書は日本語で
evals.expected_output: 3–5 app proposals in Japanese Markdown, grounded in the freelance/invoicing/time-tracking domain from the seed. All standard sections present. Monetization realistic for small freelancers (low price point).
assertions: Output is written in Japanese
Output contains at least 3 distinct app proposals
Proposals address freelance pain points from the seed (invoicing, time tracking, expense tracking)
Monetization pricing reflects the budget mentioned in seed (~¥500–1,000/month)
Each proposal includes Expo + AWS tech architecture
Output ends with a ranked recommendation in Japanese

evals.prompt: iOSアプリのアイデアを考えて
evals.expected_output: idea-generator generates a seed inline (first-person, conversational style with existing tool names, price sensitivity, and target user line), then produces 3–5 app proposals using the standard template. No seed file is provided — the seed must be generated from scratch.
assertions: Output includes a generated seed section before the proposals (persona, existing tools, price sensitivity, 想定ユーザー)
Generated seed is written in first-person conversational Japanese (口語調)
Generated seed mentions at least one real existing app or tool by name
Generated seed includes price sensitivity (monthly or annual amount)
Generated seed ends with a 想定ユーザー line
Output contains at least 3 distinct app proposals
Each proposal has a Target Audience section with a table
Each proposal includes a Monetization Strategy section with pricing
Each proposal includes an AWS architecture table
Output ends with a ranked recommendation summary

evals.prompt: 健康・メンタル系でiOSアプリのアイデアを考えて
evals.expected_output: idea-generator generates a seed scoped to health/mental wellness domain, then produces 3–5 proposals grounded in that seed. The seed should reflect a realistic health/mental wellness persona with specific pain points and existing tool complaints.
assertions: Output includes a generated seed section before the proposals
Generated seed is scoped to health or mental wellness domain
Generated seed mentions at least one real health/wellness app by name (e.g., Apple Health, Calm, Headspace, MyFitnessPal)
Generated seed includes price sensitivity
Output contains at least 3 distinct app proposals
All proposals are grounded in health or mental wellness domain
Each proposal includes a Scorecard with star ratings
Output ends with a ranked recommendation summary
